title: A Distant Trumpet
writer: John Twist, Richard Fielder, Albert Beich
actors: Troy Donahue, Suzanne Pleshette, Diane McBain
plot: West Point graduate Lt. Hazard is posted to Fort Delivery, Arizona, where he has to deal with lax discipline, romantic complications, Apaches and his conflicting feelings toward the Indians.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
